strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth with Kotlin; Java exposure is older and narrow (robotic arms tooling)
Current career gap since October 2025 may require context on availability and recent activity
response.justification: The candidate brings extensive full-stack experience aligned with the primary TypeScript/Node/React stack, plus recent direct work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that maps closely to a stated requirement. Engineering maturity is evident through long-term craftsmanship practices, TDD advocacy, and architecture-level contributions across diverse domains. Gaps around Nest.js specifically and limited recent Kotlin/Java depth are the main areas where fit would need to be probed further.
